```{r footer-env}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Load the .env so we can use the links in the footer
# We store the links there because some of the links themselves contain secrets
for (footer_env_path in c(".env", "../.env", "../../.env")) {
  if (file.exists(footer_env_path)) {
    dotenv::load_dot_env(footer_env_path)
    break
  }
}
```

## Additional resources

- **CanadaLogin metrics dashboard** ([Power BI](`r Sys.getenv("FOOTER_DASHBOARD_URL")`)) - the live dashboard, accessible only on your ESDC laptop.
- **CanadaLogin Metrics Cookbook** ([website](https://cds-snc.github.io/canadalogin-metrics-cookbook/) | [repo](https://github.com/cds-snc/canadalogin-metrics-cookbook)) - how each metric is defined and calculated, and what data is available.
- **Signal Check report archive** ([CDS Google Drive](`r Sys.getenv("FOOTER_ARCHIVE_GDRIVE_URL")`) | [ESDC SharePoint](`r Sys.getenv("FOOTER_ARCHIVE_SHAREPOINT_URL")`)) - past editions of this report<a id="cat-trigger" href="#" title="">.</a>

<!--
Easter egg: the period above is a disguised link. Clicking it makes a small cat
peek up from the bottom-right corner (click the cat to dismiss). Kept here in the
shared, unfrozen footer so it renders on every edition. The <img> src stays a
local path; Quarto's embed-resources inlines it into the self-contained HTML.
-->
<style>
#cat-trigger { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
#cat-egg {
  position: fixed;
  right: 1.5rem;
  bottom: -25px;
  width: 240px;
  max-width: 38vw;
  z-index: 9999;
  transform: translateY(112%);
  transition: transform 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
  cursor: pointer;
  pointer-events: none;
}
#cat-egg.cat-visible {
  transform: translateY(0);
  pointer-events: auto;
}
#cat-egg img { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; }
#cat-egg .cat-caption {
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
  color: #333;
  transform: rotate(-4deg);
}
</style>

<div id="cat-egg" onclick="this.classList.remove('cat-visible')">
  <div class="cat-caption">hang in there babe</div>
  <img src="../img/cat-only.png" alt="A graffiti drawing of a cat clinging to a ledge by its paws, in the style of the 'Hang in there' poster, captioned 'hang in there babe'.">
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var trigger = document.getElementById("cat-trigger");
  var egg = document.getElementById("cat-egg");
  if (!trigger || !egg) return;
  trigger.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    egg.classList.toggle("cat-visible");
  });
})();
</script>
